description_long: This house features a modern, boxy architectural design with clean lines and a predominantly white exterior. The structure is multi-leveled, with large rectangular windows arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern across the facades. The property is landscaped with several trees and shrubs, and includes a fenced outdoor area that appears to contain a pool or water feature. The roof is flat, with some sections featuring raised parapets and skylights. The main entryway is understated, with a simple door and minimal decorative elements, blending seamlessly into the geometric facade. The overall appearance is sleek and contemporary, emphasizing simplicity and integration with the surrounding greenery.
description: A modern, multi-level white house with flat roofs, large windows, and landscaped greenery, featuring a fenced outdoor area and a sleek, geometric design.
description_view_0: Narrow side view showing tall windows, a tree in the foreground, and minimal entry features.
description_view_1: Wide side view displaying the main facade with large windows, a fenced pool area, and multiple trees.
description_view_2: Opposite narrow side view with similar window arrangement and dense greenery at the base.
description_view_3: Rear or alternate wide view showing more of the outdoor area, additional trees, and the geometric roofline.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple flush door with minimal trim, no porch, and integrated into the facade with understated landscaping.
